item.title: Water Baron Controls Last Known Well in Sector 7
item.description: He charges ten bullets per gallon. The thirsty have no choice.

item.title: Nintendo Entertainment System Revives the Video Game Industry
item.description: After the crash, a plumber named Mario restores joy to living rooms.

item.title: Polio Vaccine Declared Safe After Nationwide Trials
item.description: Dr. Salk's breakthrough is here. Parents are eagerly awaiting their turn.

item.title: Plague Ships Spotted in the Southern Harbor
item.description: The port authority has mandated a forty-day quarantine for all vessels.

item.title: Neural Interface Hack Exposes 2 Million Brain-Linked Users
item.description: Victims report vivid memories of a beach they never visited.

item.title: FIVE-YEAR PLAN EXCEEDS QUOTA BY 12%
item.description: Comrade workers have surpassed expectations in steel and concrete production.

item.title: Architect Unveils Plans for Mile-High Tower
item.description: Skeptics call it impossible. The architect calls it Tuesday.

item.title: Aether-Train Derailment Claims Twelve Lives
item.description: Investigators suspect sabotage by Luddite activists.
